events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday Angle
angles.copy: The man behind some of rock's most iconic riffs is turning 79 today. Happy birthday to Queen legend, Brian May.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Still got the moves! The inimitable Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones is 83 today. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, a channel launched that changed music forever. MTV hit our screens, and the first video played was 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of the 90s. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, was held from August 15 to 18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Peace, love, and three days of music. 57 years ago, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Elvis Presley passed away 49 years ago, but his music lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969 in the UK and October 1, 1969 in the US.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: One of the most iconic album covers and LPs turns 57 today. The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' hit shelves in 1969. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the trailblazing Chrissie Hynde of The Pretenders! Still sounding incredible.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune with his vocals?

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Launch Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Remember clicking through your entire music library on this? 25 years ago, Apple launched the original iPod. A true game-changer.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day Angle
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's James Bond Day! Which Bond actor or theme tune is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday Angle
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! What's your favourite Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
